Class CustomerMonthlySpend

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.CustomerMonthlySpend
public class CustomerMonthlySpend extends Object
Class that records monthly spend of customers and uses that data to also calculate whether a rate change is needed.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    CustomerMonthlySpend.FlexiRateChange
    This record stores the need for a rate change and the new rate and is returned by warrantsRateChange(int id) and used by SaleService to adjust flexi rates accordingly.

  • Constructor Details

    • CustomerMonthlySpend

      public CustomerMonthlySpend(int customerID, YearMonth monthYear, float spend)
      Constructor for CustomerMonthlySpend class.
      Parameters:
      customerID - The ID of the customer.
      monthYear - The month and year of the spend.
      spend - The amount spent.

    • CustomerMonthlySpend

      public CustomerMonthlySpend()
      Default constructor for CustomerMonthlySpend class.

  • Method Details

    • recordSpend

      public void recordSpend(CustomerMonthlySpend spend)
      Upsert method that records a customer's monthly spend. If the current month and/or customer ID doesn't exist, it creates a new record for spend. If the current month and/or customer ID exists, it adds the spend to the existing record.
      Parameters:
      spend - The spend to be recorded.

    • warrantsRateChange

      public CustomerMonthlySpend.FlexiRateChange warrantsRateChange(int id)
      Checks if a customer's monthly spend warrants a rate change. It uses the calculateRate(float currSpending) method to determine the new rate. It is used by SaleService to adjust flexi rates following a purchase.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the customer.
      Returns:
      A CustomerMonthlySpend.FlexiRateChange object indicating whether a rate change is needed and the new rate.

    • getCustomerID

      public int getCustomerID()

      public YearMonth getMonthYear()

    • getSpend

      public float getSpend()
